breathing (GPB) technique useful patients with reduced vital capacity owing respiratory muscle paralysis, example following poliomyelitis tetraplegic.
trick movement that first described Dail (1951) when patients with poliomyelitis were observed gulping into their lungs.
this gulping action that gave technique name 'frog breathing'.
breathing form positive pressure ventilation produced patient's voluntary muscles where boluses forced into lungs.

most common patients able breathe spontaneously whose power cough clear secretions inadequate.
technique enable these patients shout attract attention help maintain improve lung chest wall compliance (Dail 1955).
breathe series pumping strokes produced action lips, tongue, soft palate, pharynx larynx.
held chest larynx which acts valve mouth opened next gulp.
Before starting teach patient breathing helpful inflate chest using intermittent positive pressure ventilator with mouthpiece.
practice holding breath while removing mouthpiece avoiding escape through larynx nose.
most important step learning down movement cricoid cartilage while keeping still.
patient practice watching movement mirror feeling cartilage with fingers.
This sequence should practised slowly first then gradually speeded until movement flows.
leak occur through nose and, until prevented soft palate, nose required.
next stage take maximum breath and, while holding this breath, several gulps, augment vital capacity.
When correct, patient will feel chest filling with air, test 'GPB vital capacity' putting mouthpiece attached expiratory limb Wright's respirometer patient's mouth before exhales.
respirometer used measure volume gulp; patient will require less effort reach maximum capacity more quickly develops bigger volume gulp.
study Kelleher Parida (1957) reported group patients whom average volume gulp varied from 25-120 when teaching attempt should made achieve least gulp.
When used clearance secretions, 10-20 gulps required obtain maximal vital capacity, being used continuously substitute normal tidal breathing approximately gulps taken before breathing out.
breathing would normally taught with patient comfortable sitting position, when mastered should practiced positions useful patient clear bronchial secretions.
After filling chest capacity signals compresses chest lets patient have sufficient muscle power apply compression himself carers taught give assistance.
learnt easily some patients, others need time patience acquire this skill must motivated practise frequently during learning period.
valuable technique consider when treating tetraplegic poliomyelitis patients with vital capacity less litres.
Instruction begin when patient reached stable condition, inappropriate acute phase during acute chest infection.
When successfully learnt invaluable during period chest infection assist clearance secretions.
patient with chest infection nursed 'tank' ventilator ('iron lung'), assisted coughing (Higgens 1966) more effective patient uses augment inspiratory volume received from ventilator before chest compression applied.
possible teach breathing patients with uncuffed tracheostomy tube, provided there effective seal round tube avoid leaks.
breathing should attempted patients with neuromuscular disorders affecting swallowing, and, patients with progressive disorder, intermittent positive pressure breathing more appropriate than GPB.

Happy Halloween: Smiley's Costumes!

quickly avocado Dollar Tree cardboard paper success!

have noticed pictures Instagram, read posts wrote about rescue Smiley have even read viral Dodo article about rescue story!
unexpected adoption only took weeks fostering realize that Smiley belonged with forever) changed plans.
those crazy Halloween parties wanted turned into going dog-friendly events, parade tonight we'll going Halloween Parade with Smiley tow.
ended going another last minute event, Tompkins Square parade, Smiley wore same avocadog costume outshined popes other crazy intricate creative costumes!
we're definitely going again next year with better costume.
Although most dogs wore dogs, delivery costumes they rocked them, crafter inspired something little more creative!
Tonight, parade mainly people Smiley will hopefully steal show long actually wears costume made doesn't fall apart.
Stay tuned photos tonights shenanigans.

We've been Tonsai twice once December second time July.
December hot, dry, lively exciting!
July dead, everything closed, weather miserable!
Tonsai great place that's still pretty empty compared Island even neighboring beaches.
While it's perfect getaway during high (and dry) season, it's really enjoyable during (monsoon) season.
Unless enjoy being tourists hard spot with only available restaurants that mainly serve fried food.
come other time, enjoy long tail boat ride beach, choice many restaurants, food vendors bars, there lots people hanging beach hostels there also thieving mischievous monkeys!
